name: io.github.MariusAure/needhuman-mcp
title: NeedHuman
description: Human-as-a-Service for AI agents. When your agent needs a real human (accept ToS, create accounts, verify identity), it calls NeedHuman. A human completes the task and the agent continues.

environmentVariables.name: NEEDHUMAN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your NeedHuman API key. Get one free (3 tasks): curl -X POST https://needhuman.ai/api/v1/keys/register -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "my-agent"}'

environmentVariables.name: NEEDHUMAN_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://needhuman.ai
